steps.title: Identify what supports the researcher's claim
steps.content: The researcher claims that some lakes have seen a decline in ice duration from 1980-81 to 2005-06. To support this claim, we need a lake that shows fewer days of ice in 2005-06 than in 1980-81.

steps.title: Match the evidence to the claim
steps.content:
Choice B shows Lake Kallavesi with approximately 175 days of ice in 1980-81 and approximately 145 days in 2005-06—a loss of roughly 30 days.

The other three choices either show an increase over time, deny that any decline occurred, or describe only 2005-06 values without proving decline across both periods.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
